purpose: Replace synchronous preview generation with async polling to handle HF timeouts and concurrent generation

phases.name: Status Lifecycle Formalization
phases.description: Formally define preview status state machine

tasks.title: Document preview status state machine
tasks.description: pending → processing → complete|failed; include transitions and validation

tasks.title: Add status validation in updatePreview checks

phases.name: Async Generation Pipeline
phases.description: Extract preview generation into background task (via serverless timeout or queue)

tasks.title: Refactor generatePreview to mark status: processing then return
tasks.description: Don't wait for generation; return immediately with status:processing

tasks.title: Extract runPreviewGeneration as standalone function
tasks.description: Can be called from serverless, queue, or timeout handler

tasks.title: Implement retry logic for HF timeouts

phases.name: Polling UI + WebSocket (optional)
phases.description: Front-end UI for status polling during generation

tasks.title: Create PreviewStatus component with polling
tasks.description: Poll getPreview() every 2 seconds, show status badge

tasks.title: Add regenerate button for failed previews

phases.name: Photo Storage Migration
phases.description: Move from base64 customerPhotoUrl to remote HTTPS URL

tasks.title: Migrate customerPhotoUrl from data: URL to Cloudinary
Generate customerPhotoHash from downloaded bytes
tasks.description: Hash used for cache key computation

phases.name: E2E Testing
phases.description: Comprehensive testing of async preview flow

tasks.title: E2E: Upload photo → get processing status → poll until complete
E2E: Verify cache reuse (same photo + wrap)
tasks.description: Second upload should return cached preview

blockers: Requires catalog asset role consolidation (phase 1) to be complete first
notes: This refactor is required for production reliability
HF inference can timeout under high concurrency; async is critical
Cache reuse is performant win (avoids redundant generations)
acceptance_criteria: UI polls and shows real-time status updates
Photos stored as HTTPS URLs, not base64
E2E tests cover success, timeout, and cache-hit paths
